title: NEO 4.0 RISK_REGISTER
_status: INSTALLED 4.0-P3-A (from the KEPT 4.0 Session-0 draft). Live spine schema. Drives D4 audit tier + D5 gate policy. profile_risk-adjacent; its risk classifications MUST be explicit — no silent MEDIUM->low (Q3/A7).

area.description: Q6 ratified never-batchable set are enumerated here; 'general_feature' is the only batchable-eligible area.

never_batchable.description: TRUE for every area except general_feature (D5). Exact-inspection, explicit START/END.

audit_tier.description: D4 mapping. MEDIUM defaults to 'isolated' unless an explicit downgrade record is present (below).

explicit_downgrade.description: Q3/A7: the ONLY way MEDIUM audit_tier may be 'lightweight'. Null = no downgrade. A 'lightweight' tier on a medium risk WITHOUT this record => BLOCKED (no silent fall-through, T2).
